sentence: 他退休后写了一本回忆录，讲述自己的经历。
pinyin: Tā tuìxiū hòu xiěle yì běn huíyìlù, jiǎngshù zìjǐ de jīnglì.
english: After retiring, he wrote a memoir recounting his life experiences.

meaning: 1. to have an informal discussion; 2. CL:次[cì],個|个[gè]
sentence: 下午我们和几位专家进行了座谈。
pinyin: Xiàwǔ wǒmen hé jǐ wèi zhuānjiā jìnxíngle zuòtán.
english: This afternoon we had an informal discussion with several experts.

meaning: To climb a mountain; To climb over, to ascend onto
sentence: 我们周末去登山，风景很美。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhōumò qù dēngshān, fēngjǐng hěn měi.
english: We went mountain climbing on the weekend — the scenery was beautiful.

sentence: 她晚饭后喜欢喝一杯红酒。
pinyin: Tā wǎnfàn hòu xǐhuān hē yī bēi hóngjiǔ.
english: She likes to have a glass of red wine after dinner.
Please take your seats according to your number.
